---
name: 🔍 Deep System Data - Feature Request
about: Request support for detecting/cleaning a specific app's system data
title: '[Deep Scan] Add support for [APP_NAME]'
labels: 'enhancement, deep-system-data'
assignees: ''
---

## 📱 App Information

**App Name:** 
**Location:** (e.g., ~/Library/Application Support/AppName)
**Estimated Size:** (e.g., 5 GB)
**Category:** (e.g., Chat App, Video Editor, IDE)

## 🎯 Why should this be added?

Describe why this app commonly accumulates large amounts of data:
- [ ] Chat history/media cache
- [ ] Video/audio cache
- [ ] Development artifacts
- [ ] Downloads/temp files
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 📍 Data Location

Please provide the full path(s) where this app stores data:
```
~/Library/Application Support/[AppName]
~/Library/Containers/[BundleID]
~/Library/Group Containers/[GroupID]
```

## 🧪 Testing

Can you test the cleanup on your machine?
- [ ] Yes, I can test it
- [ ] No, but I can provide info

## 📊 Screenshots (Optional)

If possible, add screenshots showing:
- System Data size from System Settings
- `du -sh` output of the app folder
- The app's settings/cache location

## Additional Context

Add any other context about this request here.
